name: Cherry Island
short_description: "FPS and simulator" The officer Willow is working for the Nations Defensive Alliance (NDA) to protect the fictional islands of Cherry. The threat ? A war engineering society invading the earth for bad reasons: the Z Corporation.
detailed_description:
Fighting in a world of trouble.

Officer Willow is working for the Nations Defensive Alliance (NDA) to protect the Cherry Islands near the Caribbean Sea. The threat? A war engineering society invading Earth for malicious reasons: the Z Corporation.

From a first-person shooter to a simulation view, including jets, boats, or armored vehicles, this 3D game offers intense solo action. Experience a life of danger, from solo war gameplay to various arcade simulations and situations.

Additional content will be added to this product over the months.

Details
  • Dozens of controlable vehicles (attack jet, yachts, war cargo, civilian vehicles).
  • Enter the battle of two bots factions where you will make the difference for your side.
  • Experience the Battle Royale mod editor.
  • Custom missions gives you direct access to various actions that you can find during the history mod.

Next release
Two new areas of the battle royale mod will be available in August 2024, and a free demo will be available on August 16, 2024.

English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
